cards.oracle_excerpt: White spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

cards.adaptation_note: Trusted broad ramp exists; add Oracle hash/scope if runtime covers any-color rock/untap cadence sufficiently.
cards.oracle_excerpt: Untap this artifact during each other player's untap step. // {T}: Add one mana of any color.

cards.adaptation_note: Trusted broad ramp exists but gives chosen player colorless; verify self-use model before hash-only.
cards.oracle_excerpt: Untap this artifact during each other player's untap step. // {T}: A player of your choice adds {C}.

cards.adaptation_note: MDFC sorcery/land, two flying Angel Warrior tokens, non-Angel indestructible duration.
cards.oracle_excerpt: Create two 4/4 white Angel Warrior creature tokens with flying. Non-Angel creatures you control gain indestructible until your next turn. // // // As this land enters, you may pay 3 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. // {T}: Add {W}.

cards.adaptation_note: Vow counter + each-player sacrifice-rest + attack restriction.
cards.oracle_excerpt: Each player puts a vow counter on a creature they control and sacrifices the rest. Each of those creatures can't attack you or planeswalkers you control for as long as it has a vow counter on it.

cards.adaptation_note: Gift branch + destroy all creatures + return own destroyed creature.
cards.oracle_excerpt: Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.) // Destroy all creatures. If the gift was promised, return a creature card put into your graveyard this way to the battlefield under

cards.adaptation_note: Mana rock plus harnessed blink end-step loop; XMage exact but not generic Mind Stone.
cards.oracle_excerpt: Indestructible // {T}: Add {W}. // {5}{W}, {T}: Harness The Mind Stone. (Once harnessed, its ∞ ability is active.) // ∞ — At the beginning of your end step, exile up to one other target nonland permanent you control, then return that card to the battlefield un

cards.adaptation_note: Power-based static cost reduction for instant/sorcery MV>=4.
cards.oracle_excerpt: Instant and sorcery spells you cast with mana value 4 or greater cost {X} less to cast, where X is The Scarlet Witch's power.

cards.adaptation_note: Per-player/type controller choice then sacrifice all other nonland permanents.
cards.oracle_excerpt: For each player, you choose from among the permanents that player controls an artifact, a creature, an enchantment, and a planeswalker. Then each player sacrifices all other nonland permanents they control.

cards.adaptation_note: Current passive trusted row misses discard-trigger modal draw/treasure/life-loss behavior.
cards.oracle_excerpt: Whenever you discard a card, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn — // • Draw a card. // • Create a Treasure token. // • Each opponent loses 3 life.

cards.adaptation_note: Current pump_all trusted row misses combat-damage copy/cast branch; likely more than hash-only.

cards.adaptation_note: No exact local XMage class; miracle grant for nonland hand cards.
cards.oracle_excerpt: Nonland cards in your hand have miracle {0}. (You may cast a card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

cards.adaptation_note: No exact local XMage class; ETB graveyard play permission plus noncreature spell damage trigger.
cards.oracle_excerpt: Flying // When Thor enters, exile target Equipment, instant, or sorcery card from your graveyard. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card. // Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, Thor deals damage equal to that spell's mana value to any targe

credit_policy.exact_xmage_partial_generic: Exact local XMage class but local mapper emitted generic scope. Inspect Java/oracle before implementing.
credit_policy.exact_xmage_strong_reference: Exact local XMage class plus non-generic ManaLoom candidate. Use as strong design/test reference, still gated by Oracle and local tests.
credit_policy.exact_xmage_unmapped_needs_manual: Exact local XMage class exists but mapper cannot model it yet.
credit_policy.oracle_only_no_exact_xmage: No exact local XMage class; use Oracle/Scryfall and optional nearby classes only.
